action.reasoning: Observation: OOM with d_model=256, 3 layers - full dataset forward pass on GPU uses too much memory (28.91 GiB allocated). Analysis: Need mini-batch training to handle larger models within GPU memory. The smaller model (d_model=128, 2 layers) achieved val AUC 0.7278 and was still improving - training longer with mini-batches should help, and I can also scale up moderately. Decision: Implement mini-batch training with d_model=192, n_layers=3, which is a good middle ground. Train 80 epochs with cosine LR.
